TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Siaw_Can-haw, title = Siaw_Can-haw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Siaw_Can-haw} }

S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox person O Amis Sinsin (Holam: ťėŅÁĺéŤÄĀŚłę; Siaw Can-haw ; a miheca saka a folad saka a romi'adÔľć saka) cecay mi'edaw a tamdaw to Ciweytusu i Taywan. Na u micamol to malalifet Minunhawhawwan i JETÁ∂úŚźąŚŹį.
S.PHON: masa…ĺipa:info~ub~b~vo~ux p…ôrso~un o~u amis sinsin (ńßo~u…ĺam: ****; siaw ¶an-ńßaw ; a mińß…ô ¶a saka a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ* saka) ¶…ô ¶aj mi °…ô…¨~…ģaw a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u ¶iw…ôjto~u~uso~u~u i tajwan. na o~u~u mi ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ma…ĺa…ĺif…ôt mino~u~unńßawńßawwan i *…ôt***.
